name: Buddy
description: Receives audio from the Buddy iOS app, transcribes it, and dispatches the text to the active agent.

httpRoutes.description: Receive an audio clip from the Buddy iOS app, transcribe it, and dispatch the text to the agent. Requires Authorization: Bearer <authToken>.

authToken.title: Bearer token
authToken.description: The token the iOS app must send. Auto-generated on first install if empty.

model.title: Model id
model.description: Override the default model. ElevenLabs: scribe_v1. OpenAI: gpt-4o-transcribe.

languageHints.title: Default language hints
languageHints.description: ISO 639-1 codes. Per-request hints from the iOS app's X-Language-Hints header override these.

audioField.title: Multipart field name for the audio file

framing.title: System framing prompt
framing.description: Optional override for the system addendum that frames the voice as a deliberate task.

sessionId.title: Target session key
sessionId.description: The OpenClaw session to inject voice captures into. Defaults to your WhatsApp DM session. Format: agent:main:whatsapp:direct:+1234567890
